_comment: SWEF v1.0.0-rc1 — Steam (Steamworks) submission configuration template. Complete all fields in the Steamworks partner portal before requesting a store review.
appId: TODO: Assign App ID from Steamworks partner portal

storePageConfig.shortDescription: Fly from your real GPS location through photorealistic 3D Earth and into space.

minimum.network: Broadband 10 Mbps (required for Cesium tile streaming)

recommended.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 / AMD RX 6700 XT

minimum.cpu: Apple M1 or Intel Core i7 (2018+)

recommended.cpu: Apple M2 or Intel Core i9 (2020+)

depotConfig.baseDepotId: TODO: Assign depot IDs in Steamworks

steamAchievements.note: Map AchievementManager achievement keys to Steam stat names. See Assets/SWEF/Scripts/Achievement/ for key list.

steamWorkshop.note: Community Content Marketplace (Phase 94) uses in-game marketplace, not Steam Workshop. Consider enabling in a future patch.

thirdPartyLicences: Cesium for Unity (Cesium GS, Inc.) — Apache 2.0
Google Maps Tiles API (Google LLC) — subject to Maps Platform ToS
legalAndContent.contentDescriptor: This game uses GPS location data and requires an internet connection for tile streaming.

assetChecklist.capsuleHeader_460x215: TODO: Key art with logo. No text covering more than 25% of image.
assetChecklist.capsuleSmall_231x87: TODO: Logo-only or minimal text capsule.
assetChecklist.capsuleMain_616x353: TODO: Main capsule art — primary store page hero.
assetChecklist.libraryHero_3840x1240: TODO: Full-bleed hero for Steam Library.
assetChecklist.libraryCapsule_600x900: TODO: Portrait capsule for Steam Library.
assetChecklist.screenshots_min5: TODO: At least 5 screenshots at 1920×1080 px showing key features.
assetChecklist.trailer_1080p: TODO: Upload 1–3 minute trailer video to Steamworks.
